title: Tree Census — Observations Data Dictionary
note: One row per field observation (tree stem, seedling, or woody debris), discriminated by observation_type. Every column is stored as STRING in BigQuery and cast at read time. `appliesTo` names the observation_type a field is populated for ('all' = every row).

fields.name: map_record_id
fields.label: Record ID
fields.description: Primary key. Unique identifier for a single observation row, used as the map point id in the DMCR Looker layer.

fields.name: observation_type
fields.label: Observation Type
fields.description: Discriminator for the kind of observation. One of tree_stem, seedling, or woody_debris; determines which measurement fields are populated.

fields.name: source_status
fields.label: Status
fields.description: Data-quality state of the row as delivered by the source. 'clean' means it passed source-side validation.

fields.name: plot_id
fields.label: Plot ID
fields.description: Stable identifier of the survey plot the observation belongs to.

fields.name: plot_no_raw
fields.label: Plot No. (raw)
fields.description: Plot number exactly as entered in the field form, before normalization.

fields.name: plot_no_int
fields.label: Plot No.
fields.description: Plot number parsed to an integer for sorting and joins.

fields.name: subplot_id
fields.label: Subplot ID
fields.description: Stable identifier of the subplot within the plot.

fields.name: subplot_raw
fields.label: Subplot (raw)
fields.description: Subplot value exactly as entered in the field form.

fields.name: subplot_no
fields.label: Subplot No.
fields.description: Subplot number parsed to an integer.

fields.name: subplot_name
fields.label: Subplot Name
fields.description: Named quadrant of the subplot layout.

fields.name: subplot_code
fields.label: Subplot Code
fields.description: Short code for the subplot, derived from its name/position.

fields.name: dataset_type
fields.label: Dataset Type
fields.description: Origin dataset/table the record was loaded from, mirroring observation_type.

fields.name: item_tag_id_raw
fields.label: Item Tag ID (raw)
fields.description: Physical tag identifier fixed to the item in the field, as recorded.

fields.name: local_x_m
fields.label: Local X
fields.description: Local plot-relative X coordinate in metres.

fields.name: local_y_m
fields.label: Local Y
fields.description: Local plot-relative Y coordinate in metres.

fields.name: utm_easting
fields.label: UTM Easting
fields.description: Projected UTM easting of the observation.

fields.name: utm_northing
fields.label: UTM Northing
fields.description: Projected UTM northing of the observation.

fields.name: utm_zone
fields.label: UTM Zone
fields.description: UTM zone number for the easting/northing pair.

fields.name: utm_hemisphere
fields.label: UTM Hemisphere
fields.description: Hemisphere of the UTM coordinate (N or S).

fields.name: latitude
fields.label: Latitude
fields.description: WGS84 latitude in decimal degrees.

fields.name: longitude
fields.label: Longitude
fields.description: WGS84 longitude in decimal degrees.

fields.name: geo_ready
fields.label: Geo Ready
fields.description: Whether the row has usable geographic coordinates for mapping.

fields.name: coordinate_note
fields.label: Coordinate Note
fields.description: Free-text note about how coordinates were derived or any caveats.

fields.name: azimuth_deg
fields.label: Azimuth
fields.description: Compass bearing from the plot reference point to the item, in degrees.

fields.name: distance_m
fields.label: Distance
fields.description: Distance from the plot reference point to the item, in metres.

fields.name: species_id
fields.label: Species ID
fields.description: Stable identifier of the matched species.

fields.name: species_raw
fields.label: Species (raw)
fields.description: Species name/label exactly as entered in the field form.

fields.name: thai_name
fields.label: Thai Name
fields.description: Common Thai name of the species.

fields.name: scientific_name
fields.label: Scientific Name
fields.description: Binomial scientific name of the species.

fields.name: scientific_author
fields.label: Scientific Author
fields.description: Taxonomic authority/author citation for the scientific name.

fields.name: normalized_species_name
fields.label: Normalized Species
fields.description: Cleaned, canonical species name used for grouping and joins.

fields.name: tree_id
fields.label: Tree ID
fields.description: Identifier of the tree individual. Multiple stems can share one tree_id.

fields.name: stem_id
fields.label: Stem ID
fields.description: Identifier of the individual stem within a tree.

fields.name: stem_no
fields.label: Stem No.
fields.description: Sequence number of the stem on a multi-stemmed tree.

fields.name: size_class_raw
fields.label: Size Class (raw)
fields.description: Size class as entered in the field form.

fields.name: size_class_code
fields.label: Size Class
fields.description: Normalized size-class code for the stem.

fields.name: stand_fall_raw
fields.label: Stand/Fall (raw)
fields.description: Standing-vs-fallen status as entered in the field form.

fields.name: stand_fall_code
fields.label: Stand/Fall
fields.description: Normalized standing/fallen code. S = standing, F = fallen, L = leaning.

fields.name: live_dead_raw
fields.label: Live/Dead (raw)
fields.description: Live-vs-dead status as entered in the field form.

fields.name: live_dead_code
fields.label: Live/Dead
fields.description: Normalized vitality code. L = live, D = dead, S = snag.

fields.name: gbh_cm
fields.label: GBH
fields.description: Girth at breast height in centimetres.

fields.name: gbh_method_raw
fields.label: GBH Method (raw)
fields.description: Method used to measure girth, as entered.

fields.name: gbh_method_code
fields.label: GBH Method
fields.description: Normalized girth-measurement method code.

fields.name: total_height_m
fields.label: Total Height
fields.description: Total tree/stem height in metres.

fields.name: height_method_raw
fields.label: Height Method (raw)
fields.description: Method used to measure height, as entered.

fields.name: height_method_code
fields.label: Height Method
fields.description: Normalized height-measurement method code.

fields.name: crown_class_raw
fields.label: Crown Class (raw)
fields.description: Crown class (canopy position) as entered.

fields.name: crown_class_code
fields.label: Crown Class
fields.description: Normalized crown-class code (e.g. dominant, co-dominant, suppressed).

fields.name: crown_condition_raw
fields.label: Crown Condition (raw)
fields.description: Crown condition as entered in the field form.

fields.name: crown_condition_code
fields.label: Crown Condition
fields.description: Normalized crown-condition code. G = good, P = poor, D = dead, etc.

fields.name: tree_health_raw
fields.label: Tree Health (raw)
fields.description: Overall tree-health assessment as entered.

fields.name: tree_health_code
fields.label: Tree Health
fields.description: Normalized tree-health code.

fields.name: lichen_pct
fields.label: Lichen %
fields.description: Estimated percentage of the stem covered by lichen.

fields.name: seedling_id
fields.label: Seedling ID
fields.description: Identifier of the seedling record.

fields.name: seedling_count
fields.label: Seedling Count
fields.description: Number of seedlings of the species tallied in the subplot.

fields.name: woody_debris_id
fields.label: Woody Debris ID
fields.description: Identifier of the woody-debris record.

fields.name: transect_raw
fields.label: Transect (raw)
fields.description: Transect label as entered in the field form.

fields.name: transect_deg
fields.label: Transect Bearing
fields.description: Compass bearing of the debris transect line, in degrees.

fields.name: large_woody_condition_raw
fields.label: Large Woody Condition (raw)
fields.description: Decay/condition of large woody debris as entered.

fields.name: large_woody_condition_code
fields.label: Large Woody Condition
fields.description: Normalized large-woody-debris condition code. S = sound, R = rotten.

fields.name: tip_diameter_cm
fields.label: Tip Diameter
fields.description: Diameter at the tip (small end) of the woody-debris piece, in centimetres.

fields.name: middle_diameter_cm
fields.label: Middle Diameter
fields.description: Diameter at the middle of the woody-debris piece, in centimetres.

fields.name: base_diameter_cm
fields.label: Base Diameter
fields.description: Diameter at the base (large end) of the woody-debris piece, in centimetres.

fields.name: medium_piece_count
fields.label: Medium Pieces
fields.description: Count of medium-sized woody-debris pieces along the transect.

fields.name: small_piece_count
fields.label: Small Pieces
fields.description: Count of small woody-debris pieces along the transect.

fields.name: fine_piece_count
fields.label: Fine Pieces
fields.description: Count of fine woody-debris pieces along the transect.

fields.name: source_row_id
fields.label: Source Row ID
fields.description: Identifier of the originating row in the source form/CSV.

fields.name: submission_id
fields.label: Submission ID
fields.description: Identifier of the form submission that produced the row.

fields.name: import_batch_id
fields.label: Import Batch ID
fields.description: Identifier of the ETL batch that loaded the row.

fields.name: source_file_sha256
fields.label: Source File SHA-256
fields.description: SHA-256 hash of the source file, for provenance and de-duplication.

fields.name: project_id
fields.label: Project ID
fields.description: Stable identifier of the survey project.

fields.name: project_no_raw
fields.label: Project No. (raw)
fields.description: Project number as entered in the field form.

fields.name: project_no_int
fields.label: Project No.
fields.description: Project number parsed to an integer.

fields.name: added_time
fields.label: Added Time
fields.description: Timestamp the record was added/synced to the source system.

fields.name: offline_added_time
fields.label: Offline Added Time
fields.description: Timestamp the record was captured on-device while offline, before sync.

fields.name: task_owner
fields.label: Task Owner
fields.description: Field collector / owner responsible for the observation.

fields.name: validation_flag_count
fields.label: Validation Flag Count
fields.description: Number of validation flags raised against the row.

fields.name: validation_flag_codes
fields.label: Validation Flag Codes
fields.description: Comma-separated codes of the validation flags raised.

fields.name: validation_flag_severities
fields.label: Validation Flag Severities
fields.description: Comma-separated severities matching validation_flag_codes.

fields.name: remarks
fields.label: Remarks
fields.description: Free-text field remarks about the observation.
